content.problemStatement:
Recently, Chef's College Examination has concluded. He was enrolled in 333 courses and he scored A,B,CA, B, CA,B,C in them, respectively. To pass the semester, he must score at least Amin,Bmin,CminA_{min}, B_{min}, C_{min}Amin​,Bmin​,Cmin​ marks in the respective subjects along with a cumulative score of at least TminT_{min}Tmin​, i.e, A+B+C≥TminA + B + C \ge T_{min}A+B+C≥Tmin​.

Given seven integers Amin,Bmin,Cmin,Tmin,A,B,CA_{min}, B_{min}, C_{min}, T_{min}, A, B, CAmin​,Bmin​,Cmin​,Tmin​,A,B,C, tell whether Chef passes the semester or not.

###Input:


The first line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains of a single line of input, seven integers Amin,Bmin,Cmin,Tmin,A,B,CA_{min}, B_{min}, C_{min}, T_{min}, A, B, CAmin​,Bmin​,Cmin​,Tmin​,A,B,C each separated by aspace.
###Output:
Output in a single line, the answer, which should be "YES" if Chef passes the semester and "NO" if not.

You may print each character of the string in uppercase or lowercase (for example, the strings "yEs", "yes", "Yes" and "YES" will all be treated as identical).

###Constraints


1≤T≤1001 \leq T \leq 1001≤T≤100
1≤Amin,Bmin,Cmin,A,B,C≤1001 \leq A_{min}, B_{min}, C_{min}, A, B, C \leq 1001≤Amin​,Bmin​,Cmin​,A,B,C≤100
Amin+Bmin+Cmin≤Tmin≤300A_{min} + B_{min} + C_{min} \leq T_{min} \leq 300Amin​+Bmin​+Cmin​≤Tmin​≤300
constraints: 1 <= Amin, Bmin, Cmin, A, B, C <= 100
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains seven space‑separated integers: Amin Bmin Cmin Tmin A B C.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line containing "YES" if Chef passes all individual subject minimums and the total minimum, otherwise output "NO".

sampleTestCases.explanation: Each case checks the four conditions. Only the last case satisfies all, hence YES; the others fail either the total or an individual subject.
First case: all subjects meet minimums and total 15 equals Tmin, so YES. Second case: total 15 is less than required 16, so NO.

solution.approach: For each test case read the seven integers. Chef passes if and only if A >= Amin, B >= Bmin, C >= Cmin and (A + B + C) >= Tmin. Evaluate these four boolean conditions and print "YES" when all are true, otherwise print "NO".
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – constant work per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few integer variables are used.
